title: Aurora 60849 The Highway Rat 9In
features: From the best-selling children's book The Highway Rat by author Julia Donaldson and Alex Scheffler
Adorable The Highway Rat Soft Toy, perfect present for children.
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
description: From the manufacturer Aurora 60849 The Highway Rat 9In Beware of the Highway Rat. He'll steal your food and your heart! This adorable soft toy is based on the children’s book The Highway Rat by Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler the creators of The Gruffalo. This Highway Rat Soft Toy 9" has all the features of the illustration character including a feathered cavalier hat, cape and movable sword! The Highway Rat Soft Toy About us Established in 1981, Aurora World offers an extensive range of branded products for children and adults. The company sells its product lines via a wide variety of retailers including major zoos, department stores, high-end toy stores and top gift chains, as well as hospital gift shops, fine florists, candy stores and gift/stationary stores worldwide. Aurora is known in the industry for its incredibly high quality products, range of diverse offerings.
